parsed_output.justification: Jacob, Sean, and Zack all claimed roles (Villager, Troublemaker, and Robber, respectively), leaving Hunter as the only player who did not claim a role. Hunter is aggressively directing the vote toward Zack, claiming Zack is the werewolf without providing any evidence or claiming a role (such as Seer) that would grant him that knowledge. This behavior—avoiding a role claim while framing another player—is characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to divert suspicion.
